title: The Galvan Initiative
description: The Galvan Initiative is an addon to the Alien Evolution mod which adds in more content to Upgrade, giving you more options to what you can technologically possess.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_5b57b149-87de-4eee-802e-6e963001105f.png)  

**The Galvan Initiative**

   ## **Content** This pack adds new forms to the Galvanic Mechamorph in Alien Evolution, giving him more of a use in your worlds, both practical and tactical. ## **Upgrade Templates** To obtain an Upgrade Template you first need to use a Galvan template as the smithing table form. ## **Abilities** ### **Furnace** Ability 1: Fire Breath Ability 2: Fire Shot Ability 3: Smelt / Fuel (Mainhand Item) Ability 3 \[CROUCH\]: Smoke Bomb ### **Piston** Ability 1: Piston Leap Ability 1 \[DEFENSE MODE\]: Piston Pushback Ability 2: Defence Mode Ability 3: Piston Bounce ### **Anvil** Ability 1: Anvil Smash Ability 2: Leap Ability 3: Laser eye ### **Stonecutter** Ability 1: Shoot Saws Ability 2: Burrow Ability 3: Climb ### **Smithing Table** Ability 1: Defense Ability 2: Smithing Template Upgrade ## **WIP Features** We are planning on adding: dispenser and Note block
